[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]

'''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is [[Yang Water Horse]], and the following sign is [[Yang Wood Monkey]]. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

==Years of Yin Water Goat==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of 癸未'''
|-
! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[23]]
* [[83]]
* [[143]]
* [[203]]
* [[263]]
* [[323]]
* [[383]]
* [[443]]
* [[503]]
* [[563]]
* [[623]]
* [[683]]
* [[743]]
* [[803]]
* [[863]]
* [[923]]
* [[983]]
|
* [[1043]]
* [[1103]]
* [[1163]]
* [[1223]]
* [[1283]]
* [[1343]]
* [[1403]]
* [[1463]]
* [[1523]]
* [[1583]]
* [[1643]]
* [[1703]]
* [[1763]]
* [[1823]]
* [[1883]]
* [[1943]]
|
* [[2003]]
* [[2063]]
* [[2123]]
* 2183
* 2243
* 2303
* 2363
* 2423
* 2483
* [[2543]]
* [[2603]]
* [[2663]]
* [[2723]]
* [[2783]]
* [[2843]]
* 2903
* 2963
|}

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems [[Kanoe (庚)]] and [[Kinoto (乙)]]) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)]].

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

== Related Articles ==
{{wikidata link|Q1062599}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
